main.description: Temporal orchestration for content delivery. Controls when and how works surface — release schedules, gated access, sequential unlocks, ritualized drops. The world's clock.

creatorDID.description: The permanent identity of the cadence record's creator

worldReference.description: Reference to the world this cadence belongs to

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this cadence record was created

targetReferences.description: References to the works this cadence orchestrates

cadenceType.description: The temporal orchestration mode. scheduled = fixed dates/times. sequential = ordered progression, next unlocks after previous. gated = conditional access based on criteria. ritualized = irregular, unpredictable drops designed to break habituation.

cadenceRule.description: RRULE string (RFC 5545) or human-readable schedule description defining the temporal pattern

audienceTier.description: Who gets access under this cadence. public = everyone. supporters = paid/supporting audience. early = early access window before public. private = specific audience only.

unlockCondition.description: Human-readable description of what triggers the next release or access change

channelHints.description: Preferred delivery surfaces for this cadence. Presence in array = preferred. Extensible — new surfaces can be added without schema changes.

canonicalStatus.description: The canonical standing of this cadence
